title: Add GrowthKit Studio from JCode to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [GrowthKit Studio from JCode](https://growthkit.jcode.be) to business
- GrowthKit Studio from JCode uses Pollinations.ai as its LLM backend to generate Business Kit reports.

Fixes #11415

gist.headline: Growing the business garden
gist.blurb: GrowthKit Studio by JCode just sprouted in our community greenhouse! They're using our LLM backend to generate comprehensive Business Kit reports.
gist.summary: Added GrowthKit Studio by JCode to the community apps showcase, highlighting its use of Pollinations.ai as an LLM backend for generating Business Kit reports.
gist.impact: Users can now discover GrowthKit Studio in the community directory and see a real-world example of Pollinations powering automated business reporting.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'GrowthKit Studio' (business, growth, reports) joining the community garden (Greenhouse). Visuals: Polly the bee wearing a tiny business accessory (like a tie or glasses), watering a 'business' plant that sprouts little charts or reports in a cozy greenhouse setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny red necktie, happily watering a glowing code-plant that is sprouting tiny bar charts and business reports from its leaves. A chunky retro computer monitor in the background displays a green upward trend line. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
